content:
This is a concern that has been sticking with me as I play through arc 2. The baseline for levels kept oncreasing and now it is at lvl 69 in early stages of Arc 2 chapter 5.

I think you guys should cap it at 70 and should not increase further so that players will have a challanging stage while also have the ability to progress the stage. Beyond level 70 would be too much for casuals and you guys have hard mode and madness mode for that
thread_title: Story modes normal difficulty should be capped at lvl 70 awakener level.

content: Recommended levels don't really mean that much. From my experience the only lv 70 you'd need in story would be your main carry in this context.
thread_title: Story modes normal difficulty should be capped at lvl 70 awakener level.

content: But if it goes past 70. It implies that the other teammates will more or less need more resources in leveling as well. And the mats are not readily available they are time gated.
thread_title: Story modes normal difficulty should be capped at lvl 70 awakener level.

content:
game is still figuring its difficulty out sometimes
just let it be, play the game and look forward for upcoming balance changes.
Many buffs and nerfs have happened since.
Recommended levels doesn't really mean a thing honestly.
thread_title: Story modes normal difficulty should be capped at lvl 70 awakener level.

content: It's easy to say the recommended levels don't mean anything, but it's not really about them recommending an average team level for you to hit or what level your awakeners are. You go from A4 to A5, which is only five recommended levels, and health values triple.
thread_title: Story modes normal difficulty should be capped at lvl 70 awakener level.

content: W5A3 is recommended level 68 and W5A5 is recommended level 79; a scant difference of ten or eleven levels is more than seven and a half times more HP. And going from level 60 to level 70 is something of a time gate, but going from 70 to 80 is absolutely fucking brutal.
thread_title: Story modes normal difficulty should be capped at lvl 70 awakener level.

content: The average level of your awakeners doesn't really contribute as much as it otherwise implies. 10 more levels on your awakeners isn't going to increase their damage output by 750% or increase their durability by 25%. If those ten levels also raise your effective Keeper level, however, that is going to change. If the account level and the average awakener level is lower than the recommended, you will have a really hard time dealing with things like this. Especially since some teams have important mechanics dependent upon your maximum health.
thread_title: Story modes normal difficulty should be capped at lvl 70 awakener level.

content: the recommended level doesnt mean much honestly. Its more there for players who dont create teams that synergize well. A well synergized team at level 60 beats out 4 random level 90's any day of the week
thread_title: Story modes normal difficulty should be capped at lvl 70 awakener level.

content: It's mostly a time investment, honestly. When more of your awakeners are lv70, there's a correlation with an increase in the average enlighten level in your box. At some point you just start having OE teams by sheer virtue of having dumped more than a thousand pulls into the standard banner of your choice.
thread_title: Story modes normal difficulty should be capped at lvl 70 awakener level.
